abstract: Extend sound sample descriptions by appending other atoms.
overview:
## Overview

All extensions to the SoundDescription record are made using atoms. That means one or more atoms can be appended to the end of the SoundDescription record using the standard [size, type] mechanism used throughout the QuickTime movie architecture. Extensions were first added with sound sample description v1.

To illustrate this, for sound sample description v1, the extensions are added by following the last field of the struct with QuickTime atoms. The struct implementation looks like this:

Version 2 of the sound sample description maintains the same mechanism for the addition of extensions. In the sound sample description v2 structure, the `sizeOfStructOnly` field value provides the offset to the extensions.

items.description: An atom that contains parameters relevant to a decompressor component.
items.name: siSlopeAndIntercept atom

items.description: An atom that stores data specific to a given audio decompressor.
items.name: siDecompressionParam atom ('wave')

items.description: An atom that shows the data format of the stored sound media.
items.name: Format atom ('frma')

items.description: An atom that indicates the end of the sound description.
items.name: Terminator atom ('0x00000000')

items.description: A required extension to the audio sample description for MPEG-4 audio.
items.name: MPEG-4 elementary stream descriptor atom  ('esds')

items.description: An optional extension to the sound sample description specifying audio channel layouts for sound media contained in QuickTime movies.
items.name: Audio channel layout atom ('chan')

items.description: An atom that indicates a default subtitle track for a selected sound track.
items.name: Subtitle follows track reference atom ('folw')

items.description: A sound sample description contains information that defines how to interpret sound media data.
items.name: Sound sample descriptions

items.description: Sound sample formats that QuickTime supports.
items.name: Sound sample data

items.description: Position a source audio signal in a sound track to handle encoder delay.
items.name: Audio priming-handling encoder delay in AAC

title: Sound sample description extensions
